posts.author: NorthbridgeLocal42
posts.text: Just a heads-up for anyone planning a trip: The Northbridge Community Library is closing early today at 3pm due to urgent maintenance work on the roof. Please plan accordingly! #CommunityNotice #LibraryUpdate
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public notice about a library maintenance schedule with no policy violation.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.
